On Together, `mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2` and org-scoped fine-tunes (e.g. output_model_name above) are **not** on serverless inference for many accounts — start a **dedicated endpoint** in Together UI, or serve merged weights (Fireworks / vLLM) and point EXTRACTION_* there.
